title: V.A.N.N.I Mask
description: This is just a simple little POC Data Pack I made to experiment with putting the V.A.N.N.I mask into Minecraft
body:
# WARNING: THIS DATA PACK IS NOT SURVIVAL FRIENDLY. IT IS INTENDED FOR MAP USE ONLY
## This is also a texture pack. To use it, just place the file in you resource packs folder.
## New! Inside the .zip you will find an example world to help showcase the features of this pack

"The Virtual Augmented Neural Network Integration, or V.A.N.N.I, is a tool designed to help Fazbear Entertainment employees navigate the ruined Pizzaplex"

This is just a little project I made to celebrate the release of Security Breach: Ruin and to challenge myself.
To use the mask, run `/scoreboard players set Mask.Off VanniMask 1`

You are allowed to use this for any projects, as long as you credit me (if you're publicly distributing).
If you need to change the height that the player is teleported by, just go into `data/vanni/mask_on_2.mcfunction` and `data/vanni/mask_off.mcfunction`

All assets and code made by RedRain0o0

If you need any help or want to report a bug, DM on Discord at redrain0o0
